Run optimum-cli export onnx on google/paligemma-3b-pt-224 with text-generation-with-past task. Day 2: Polygraphy diff the Optimum output vs PyTorch reference. Report: did optimum work? what files produced? how far is the parity gap? Informs whether option A path holds or if we pivot to Torch-TRT alternative.

subject: VLM-5: Tests for VLM prefix pipeline
description: New tests/test_vlm_prefix.py. Integration test gated by REFLEX_INTEGRATION=1. Wave 3 — depends on VLM-1,2,3.

subject: pi0-onnx-parity: compose with expert stack + write Pi0OnnxServer
description: Extend export_pi0_prefix to also produce expert_stack.onnx (reuse pi0_exporter.build_pi0_expert_stack). Write src/reflex/runtime/pi0_onnx_server.py — composes all 5 ONNX stages + flow-matching loop in host Python. Then write scripts/local_full_diff_pi0.py for end-to-end parity diff vs real PyTorch pi0.

metadata.active_form: Composing pi0 full pipeline + writing server

subject: Write Pi0OnnxServer runtime composition
description: src/reflex/runtime/pi0_onnx_server.py — loads 5 ONNX files, implements the 5-stage pi0 forward pass (vision → projector → text → decoder_prefill → expert flow loop × 10 steps). Analog of SmolVLANativeServer but ONNX-based. Matches lerobot's PI0Pytorch.sample_actions shape-for-shape.

subject: Extract learnings from all sources into reflex_context/
description: Orchestrate parallel subagents to mine session narratives, Modal scripts, git history, conversation transcripts, Modal logs, and PM docs. Then synthesize deduped into reflex_context/ folder structure.

subject: Write GemmaFromEmbeds wrapper + re-export decoder_prefill
description: Pi0 fuses vision+text embeddings BEFORE the decoder. Optimum's Gemma export takes input_ids (auto-embeds internally), which doesn't work for us. Build a thin nn.Module that calls GemmaModel.forward(inputs_embeds=...) and returns last_hidden_state + per-layer present K/V. Export via torch.onnx.export directly. This unblocks real (non-zero) prefix_kv in Pi0OnnxServer.

subject: Write scripts/local_full_diff_pi0.py
description: Shared-noise end-to-end parity test: PyTorch pi0 policy.predict_action_chunk vs Pi0OnnxServer.predict, same seeded image+text+state+noise. Report cos, max_abs, L2. Target cos >= 0.999.
